hero.description: In the footsteps of Emperor Franz Joseph and Empress Sisi — Vinotherapy with Grüner Veltliner wine, Austrian mineral spring therapy and Habsburg rituals.

heritage.label: 300-year heritage
heritage.title: Austrian
heritage.description: Since the 18th century, European nobility sought Bad Ischl and Baden bei Wien for healing. We bring that heritage into the 21st century.

treatments.title: Royal
treatments.description: Vinotherapy with Austrian wines, alkaline mineral spring therapy, Habsburg-style massage and Empress Sisi's quail egg mask.
